title: ExperimentFlag
description: A feature flag with a governed lifecycle: off → shadow → internal → beta → on → retired. Carries a kill-switch for emergency disablement.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

name.description: Human-readable name of the feature flag (e.g. "new-obfuscation-algorithm").

state.description: Current lifecycle state: off, shadow (dark launch), internal (staff only), beta, on (general availability), or retired.

owner.description: Optional URN or username of the team or person responsible for this flag.

description.description: Optional description of what feature this flag controls.

killSwitch.description: When true, activating this flag will immediately disable the feature regardless of rollout rules.
